title: Dozen Rules
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The "'''Dozen Rules'''" were a code of conduct created by [[Urias Xhaxin]] and followed by the crew of the [[Privateer/Legends|privateering]] ship ''[[Free Lance]]'', and was seen as typical of a privateer's code of conduct. The Rules included:

*Keep mobile, be flexible
*Never pick a fight on someone your own size, and don't fight fair
*Never hunt in your own backyard
*Gamble
*Make a name for yourself
*Stick to the shadows
*Stick to the job
*Plan obsessively, but allow for the unexpected
*There are no sure things
*The prize's crew is not the enemy
*Maintain initiative
*Keep your crew well

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-02-XX -->''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''
